title: Document Requirement v2
description: Defines a single document that an applicant must, may, or conditionally must provide for an administrative procedure. Used as items in the documentsRequired array of AdministrativeProcedure. The documentTypeCode links this requirement to form fields in the form-definition satellite (via mapsToDocumentTypeCode).

documentTypeCode.description: Stable code identifying the type of document. Used as the cross-reference key between this requirement and form fields in the form-definition satellite schema (field.mapsToDocumentTypeCode). Convention: uppercase with underscores (e.g. 'CIN_COPY', 'BIRTH_CERTIFICATE', 'DOMICILE_PROOF').

label.description: Human-readable name of the required document as it should be displayed to the applicant (e.g. 'Copie de la carte d'identité nationale', 'Extrait de naissance de moins de 3 mois').

requirementLevel.description: Applicability level of this document. 'required': always mandatory — applicant cannot submit without it. 'conditional': mandatory only when the condition described in the condition field is met. 'optional': improves the application but is not blocking.

condition.description: Free-text description of when this document is required. Populated when requirementLevel is 'conditional' (e.g. 'Pour les demandeurs de nationalité étrangère', 'Si le demandeur est mineur'). Null for required or optional documents.

sourceText.description: Original text from the source document that this requirement was extracted from. Preserved for traceability and re-normalization.

confidence.description: Normalization confidence for this document requirement. 'auto_high': extracted reliably. 'auto_medium': extracted with moderate confidence, review recommended. 'manual_required': could not be reliably extracted or classified — human review required.
